ItacPersonItem.Notes: The Stamperia Camerale is assigned to the Blados since the 16th c. From 1594 to 1609, the Stamperia Camerale is run by Porzia Blado, widow of Paolo Blado (c.1550-1594), and mother of Paolo jr (1594-1609), who is the official owner of the Stamperia Camerale. For details, see Franchi, Impressioni sceniche (1990), p. 71.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
